ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "industry_diversity" TEXT /* Diversity of industries in the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "firm_size" TEXT /* Size of the firm (e.g., a, b, c, d, e) */,
  "firm_age" TEXT /* Age of the firm (e.g., m, s, l) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the firm operates in */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the firm */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the firm */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the firm was founded */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the firm */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the trend belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend data was collected */,
  "job_creation" INTEGER /* Number of jobs created */,
  "job_continuers" INTEGER /* Number of jobs that continued */,
  "job_destruction" INTEGER /* Number of jobs destroyed */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the city */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the city */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total employment in the city */,
  "sector_specific_trends" TEXT /* Trends specific to different sectors */,
  "seasonal_adjustments" TEXT /* Seasonal adjustments in the job market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_city" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the firm is located in */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the firm established in the city */,
  "branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches the firm has in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id", "city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_trends" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend the firm is associated with */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the firm on job market trends */,
  "job_creation_rate" REAL /* Rate of job creation by the firm */,
  "job_destruction_rate" REAL /* Rate of job destruction by the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id", "trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trend */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES job_market_trends ("trend_id")
)
